title: Amalgamation of J.B. Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals Ltd into Torrent Pharmaceuticals
  Limited - Record Date and Suspension
---

## Summary

BSE has informed trading members that, pursuant to the Scheme of Amalgamation approved by the Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Ahmedabad Bench, J.B. Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals Ltd ("Transferor Company", Scrip Code: 506943/106943) is being amalgamated into Torrent Pharmaceuticals Limited ("Transferee Company"). The Exchange has fixed the record date to determine shareholder entitlement to equity shares of Torrent Pharmaceuticals Limited.

## Key Points

- Amalgamation of J.B. Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals Ltd INTO Torrent Pharmaceuticals Limited, per the Scheme approved by NCLT, Ahmedabad Bench
- Record date fixed as 17 July 2026 for determining shareholder entitlement
- Trading in J.B. Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals Ltd shares (Scrip Code 506943/106943) will be suspended/no dealings effective 17 July 2026
- Settlement number DR-674/2026-2027 associated with the no-dealings period
- Upon scheme becoming effective, Torrent Pharmaceuticals Limited will issue and allot new equity shares to J.B. Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals Ltd shareholders
- Share swap ratio: 51 fully paid-up equity shares of Torrent Pharmaceuticals Limited (face value Rs. 5/- each) for every 100 fully paid-up equity shares of Re. 1/- each held in J.B. Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals Ltd

## Regulatory Changes

This is an implementation notice under the NCLT-sanctioned Scheme of Amalgamation; no new regulatory rule is introduced, but it enforces the scheme's provisions regarding record date and share allotment ratio.

## Compliance Requirements

Trading members must take note of the suspension in dealings for J.B. Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals Ltd shares from 17 July 2026 and process the corporate action per the settlement number DR-674/2026-2027. Shareholders need not take separate action; share allotment in Torrent Pharmaceuticals Limited will occur automatically per the scheme.

## Important Dates

- Record Date: 17 July 2026
- No Dealings/Suspension effective from: 17 July 2026
- Settlement No.: DR-674/2026-2027

## Impact Assessment

This is a high-impact corporate action for shareholders of J.B. Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals Ltd, as trading in the scrip will cease permanently following the record date, and holdings will be converted into Torrent Pharmaceuticals Limited shares at a fixed ratio (51:100). Market participants and trading members must adjust positions and records to reflect the delisting of J.B. Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals Ltd and allotment of Torrent Pharmaceuticals shares.
